Kazakh National Medical University, Kazakhstan

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at Kazakh National Medical University, Kazakhstan ensuring personalized and comprehensive support throughout the application and enrollment process.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Kazakhstan
  • July 15, 2024
  • Home

  • Kazakh National Medical University, Kazakhstan
# Kazakhstan

Kazakh National Medical University, Kazakhstan

Kazakh National Medical University, located in Almaty, Kazakhstan, was founded in 1930 and designated as a national university in 2001 for its strong academic history. It boasts over 11,000 students, including international ones, and employs 1,500 professors who are specialists in their fields. The university has produced more than 80,000 doctors and has 17 State Prize Laureates. It offers various medical programs at bachelor’s, master’s, and doctoral levels. The university is renowned for its modern infrastructure and medical equipment, providing quality education to students worldwide, including from India.

Overview of Kazakh National Medical University, Kazakhstan

Official Website https://kaznmu.edu.kz/

Accreditation and Recognition of Kazakh National Medical University, Kazakhstan

Kazakh National Medical University, established in 1930 in Almaty, Kazakhstan, is renowned for its excellence in medical education and global recognition.

  • Kazakh National Medical University holds accreditation from the National Medical Commission (NMC), ensuring its degrees meet Indian medical education standards.

  • It is recognized by the World Health Organization (WHO), affirming its programs meet global health standards.

  • The university is accredited by the World Federation for Medical Education (WFME), highlighting its adherence to international medical education standards.

  • Recognized by the Republic of Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Education and Science, ensuring its educational quality meets national standards

Why Study MBBS at Kazakh National Medical University, Kazakhstan?

Kazakh National Medical University, established in 1930, is a prestigious institution with a long-standing reputation for excellence in medical education. With nearly a century of experience, it offers students a rich educational environment and numerous opportunities to excel in the medical field. Here are the key reasons to consider studying MBBS at Kazakh National Medical University:

  • 90 Years of Experience: Nearly a century of expertise ensures high-quality medical education.

  • Diverse Faculties: Offers a broad spectrum of medical fields, allowing students to explore various areas of medicine.

  • International Professors: Global perspectives and the latest advancements align the curriculum with international standards.

  • WHO Recognition: Degrees respected worldwide, providing global work opportunities for graduates.

  • Senior and International Faculty: Comprehensive learning from experienced and globally-minded educators.

  • English Medium: Education in English makes it accessible and convenient for foreign students.

  • Affordable Tuition: High-quality education at a reasonable cost, making it a cost-effective choice for MBBS

Advantages of MBBS at Kazakh National Medical University

  • Excellent Opportunity for Graduation: Kazakhstan offers a valuable chance for students to earn a degree from a prestigious university.

  • Comprehensive Student Support: Universities provide proper assistance to students, promoting holistic development.

  • Access to Modern Technologies: Students use state-of-the-art technologies, preparing them to compete globally.

  • Interaction with International Faculty: Students benefit from opportunities to engage with scientists worldwide due to the university’s international faculty

Eligibility Criteria For Kazakh National Medical University

To apply for direct admission to the MBBS program at Kazakh National Medical University, applicants must meet the following requirements:

  • Age: Candidates must be at least 17 years old at the time of admission or turn 17 by the end of the admission year.

  • Academic Qualifications: Applicants must have scored 50% or above in their 12th-grade board exams, with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as main subjects. Acceptable boards include ICSE, CBSE, or state boards.

  • NEET Exam: For Indian students, passing the NEET exam is a mandatory requirement for admission.

Documents Required for Kazakh National Medical University

The following documents are required for the admission process at Kazakh National Medical University:

  • 10th Mark Sheet: Proof of secondary school education.
  • 12th Mark Sheet: Proof of higher secondary education with required subjects.
  • Passport Size Colored Photographs: Recent photographs for identification.
  • Birth Certificate: Proof of age and identity.
  • NEET Scorecard: Evidence of passing the NEET exam for Indian students.
  • Passport: Valid identification and travel document.

Student's Life at Kazakh National Medical University

Kazakh National Medical University ensures students’ mental and physical well-being through various activities:

  • Student Organizations: Numerous groups include the Committee on Youth Affairs, KVN Team, University Student Government, Debate Club, Student Union Committee Demeu, Sector of Students’ Scientific-Research Work, Council of Young Scientists, Intellectual Club, Volunteer Club, Student Ombudsman, and Students University Patrol.

  • Diverse Faculties: Various medical faculties allow students to choose their preferred field of study.

  • Multicultural Environment: Students experience a multicultural setting with peers from different nationalities.

  • International Opportunities: Participation in student exchange programs, seminars, and international conferences, thanks to the university’s global partnerships.

  • Quality Education: Recognized by the Republic of Kazakhstan’s Ministry of Education and Science, the university provides high-quality medical education to students worldwide.

  • Research and Practical Health Care: The university conducts advanced scientific investigations addressing urgent public health issues, which are implemented in practical health care services.

Library Facilities at Kazakh National Medical University

Established in 1931: The library has greatly contributed to the university’s scientific research and pedagogical activities.

Extensive Collection: Over a million books and electronic literature with 6588 copies in Russian and English.

Modern Infrastructure: Spanning 2020 square meters, the library includes catalog rooms, reading halls, a book depository, an electronic catalog, an electronic reading hall, art literature subscription, and a computer class.

Cultural and Educational Center: The library serves as the university’s hub for cultural and educational activities.

Technical Facilities: Equipped with modern technology like computers, Xerox machines, printers, and a universal local network, along with its own page on the university’s website
